summary_en: 165,000 shares (0.8% of outstanding), ¥500M upper limit, open-market acquisition, June 1–30, 2026.
title_en: Notice Regarding Determination of Matters Relating to Acquisition of Treasury Stock
translation_en_brief: On 25 May 2026, Maruchiyo Yamaokaya Corporation announced a treasury stock acquisition program authorised by the Board of Directors under Article 165(2) of the Companies Act. The company will acquire up to 165,000 shares (0.8% of issued shares excluding treasury stock) for a maximum total of ¥500 million via open-market purchase on the Tokyo Stock Exchange. The acquisition window runs from 1 June to 30 June 2026. The stated purpose is to improve capital efficiency and execute flexible capital policy in response to changing business conditions. As of 30 April 2026, the company held 193,504 treasury shares against 19,919,296 issued shares (excluding treasury stock).
